allow: Bash(cd c:/it-training-canvas-new && grep -o "import.*from ['\\"][^'\\"]*['\\"]" src/App.tsx | sed "s/^import.*from ['\\"]//;s/['\\"]$//" | sort | uniq > /tmp/app_imports.txt && cat package.json | grep -o "\\"[^\\"]*\\":" | grep -v "\\"scripts\\"\\|\\"dependencies\\"\\|\\"devDependencies\\"\\|\\"version\\"\\|\\"type\\"\\|\\"name\\"" | sed 's/^"//;s/".*$//' | sort | uniq > /tmp/packages.txt && echo "Imported in App.tsx:" && cat /tmp/app_imports.txt | head -20)
